# Robin Dualé — CEO / Managing Director · B2B SaaS & Data & AI

> Robin Dualé is a French CEO and Managing Director with 18 years of general management experience in B2B SaaS, Data, and professional information services. He is currently available for a new CEO or Managing Director mandate in a company with €10M to €100M in revenue, in a private equity or family office context. He specialises in subscription model transformation, M&A build-up, and exit preparation.

## Professional profile

Robin Dualé has led companies through full cycles of value creation: from operational transformation to growth-through-acquisition to exit. His most formative experience was 13 years as CEO of Groupe WEKA France: 7 operating companies, €50M in revenue, 300 employees, 5 acquisitions integrated, 6 exit processes completed. His most recent role was at Quick-FDS (3E Group / New Mountain Capital): post-acquisition integration of a regulatory data platform, full client base migration to 100% subscription, churn below 5% throughout the transition.

## What he is looking for

- Role: CEO or Managing Director
- Sector: B2B SaaS, Data, professional information services
- Company size: €10M to €100M in revenue
- Context: Private equity, family office, management buyout, post-acquisition integration, build-up
- Geography: France (Paris, Lyon), Switzerland, Europe

## Key expertise

- Subscription model transformation (SaaS transition, ARR growth, churn reduction)
- M&A and build-up (5 acquisitions integrated, cross-border experience)
- Exit preparation and management (6 exits completed, including sale to US strategic buyer FoodChain ID)
- AI-driven organisational transformation (strategic, operational, and commercial levels)
- PE-backed company governance and value creation

## AI and digital transformation vision

Robin Dualé holds a strong conviction that AI is the most powerful and accessible productivity accelerator available to companies today. Not as a technology project, but as an organisational transformation: augmenting every employee across marketing, sales, HR, finance, IT, and customer relations. He applies this conviction in practice — this bilingual website was built and deployed in a few hours using Claude and HeyGen, as a live demonstration of what modern AI tools make possible.

- [Perspectives](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/): Articles on B2B SaaS transformation, AI leadership, and value creation

## Key articles (Perspectives)

- [Je suis le produit / I am the product](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/je-suis-le-produit.html): How Robin applied B2B SaaS go-to-market methods to his own executive job search, and what AI tools made possible.
- [Le gain de productivité n'est plus une promesse / The productivity gain is no longer a promise](https://cv-robin.duale.fr/fr/perspectives/ia-accelerateur-organisationnel.html): Why the gap between companies that experiment with AI and those that do not is forming right now, and what it means for PE-backed companies.
